Placement: social feed educational infographic
Required canvas: 1080 x 1350 px
Required aspect ratio: 4:5 vertical
Safe margin: 64 px on all sides.
Title: top area, max 2 lines, at least 64 px equivalent.
Three steps: stacked cards or numbered rows with equal spacing; each step must be readable.
CTA and footer source line: bottom safe area.
Medical disclaimer/source line must not be smaller than 24 px equivalent.
Contrast: body text must use dark teal or navy on light mint/white; no pale text on pale mint.
